description: Generates polynomial and/or interaction features for selected continuous variables.

interface.entrypoint: transform(X_train, X_test, columns, degree=2, interaction_only=True) -> (X_tr, X_te)
interface.input_shapes: X_train: pd.DataFrame, X_test: pd.DataFrame, columns: list

known_pitfalls: Using degree > 2 on many columns can result in a combinatorially large feature space and OOM.
